series_metadata.series_description: Reports generated for the Division of Disability Determination (DDD) to reflect number of workers, leaves, and overtime hours to each position category and is the timekeeping report of personnel services for disability determination services. This file includes supporting documentation used to correlate figures.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: five (5) federal fiscal years following date of report. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records. ; Electronic: five (5) federal fiscal years following date of report. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records
